args.code: (async()=>{ const row=document.querySelector(".smtDynamicAttr10"); const sel=row?.querySelector(".ant-select-selector,.ant-select"); sel?.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent("mousedown",{bubbles:true,cancelable:true,view:window})); sel?.click(); await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,500)); const opts=[...document.querySelectorAll(".ant-select-dropdown:not(.ant-select-dropdown-hidden) .ant-select-item-option")].filter(e=>e.offsetParent!==null); const opt=opts.find(e=>e.innerText.trim()==="塑料(Plastic)")||opts.find(e=>e.innerText.includes("塑料(Plastic)")); if(!opt) return JSON.stringify({ok:false,reason:"Plastic option not found",opts:opts.map(e=>e.innerText.trim()).slice(0,40)}); opt.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent("mousedown",{bubbles:true,cancelable:true,view:window})); opt.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent("mouseup",{bubbles:true,cancelable:true,view:window})); opt.click(); await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,1000)); const text=row?.innerText||""; const p=(await window.__DXM_AUTOMATION_V1_READONLY_PREFLIGHT__()).preflight; const material=(p.requiredAttributes.fields||[]).find(x=>x.id==="material"); return JSON.stringify({ok:material&&material.ok,rowText:text.slice(0,300),material,missing:p.requiredAttributes.missing,unsafe:p.unsafeRequiredAttributeDisplays,blockers:p.risks});})()
